asset.title: Ask Spreadsheet Cas
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview successfully demonstrates an AI agent interacting with a financial spreadsheet to calculate variances. The multi-pane layout clearly shows the chat, spreadsheet updates, and execution trace.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows the agent processing a variance analysis request and updating the spreadsheet cells in real-time.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the initial state, agent execution/thinking steps, and the resulting spreadsheet updates.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with well-structured panels, though the dense layout contains a lot of simultaneous information.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of chat, spreadsheet, private agent, and execution trace.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing realistic financial data and actual agent trace logs.

legibility.evidence: Text and cell values are legible at standard resolutions, though some smaller labels require zooming.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts and operations teams automating variance reporting.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately displays the agent's thinking states and step-by-step cell locking/writing process.

observedEvidence: Public chat panel with NodeAgent messages
Room trace panel showing agent execution steps
Private agent panel on the right

defects.observed: The transition of spreadsheet cell states happens very rapidly, which may be hard to track on first viewing.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the delay between agent actions to allow the viewer to digest the cell updates.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeAgent analyze Q3 variance, automatically calculating and locking spreadsheet cells while logging its execution trace.
